allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./src/elements/ImageElement.js'\).then\(m => { const i = new m.ImageElement\({src: 'test.jpg', zoomDirection: 'in', zoomAmount: 0.1, fit: 'cover'}\); console.log\('✅ ImageElement loaded OK'\); console.log\('zoomDirection:', i.config.zoomDirection\); console.log\('zoomAmount:', i.config.zoomAmount\); console.log\('fit:', i.config.fit\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('❌', e.message\)\)")
